phase_1_httpx_h2_enabled.note: Same AsyncIOMessageLoop issue — not httpx_h2 specific
JS path — httpx_h2 not reached for JS-detected URLs
JS path — httpx_h2 not reached for JS-detected URLs

root_cause_analysis.f206ab_10_of_10_failed: Root cause NOT reproduced in isolated test. h2 is not installed, so async_get_httpx_client raises RuntimeError at line 101 of httpx_client.py. The except block at public_fetcher.py:1019 catches this, sets _httpx_reason='httpx_h2_fallback', and continues to aiohttp. The 10/10 failure in F206AB pipeline context suggests the pipeline was also calling async_get_httpx_client() at import/initialization time, causing a different failure mode.
root_cause_analysis.httpx_h2_not_installed_truth: httpx+h2 NOT installed in hledac/universal/.venv. is_httpx_h2_enabled() returns False. should_use_httpx_h2 correctly returns 'httpx_h2_disabled' for all URLs when env is set to '1' (h2 check is the final gate after env check).
root_cause_analysis.fallback_works_correctly: When httpx_h2 fails (h2 not installed), exception is caught, _httpx_reason='httpx_h2_fallback' is set, and aiohttp path is taken. transport_fallback_reason is set on FetchResult.
root_cause_analysis.auto_disable_mechanism: After 3 httpx_h2 failures via record_httpx_h2_failure(), _httpx_h2_auto_disabled=True. should_use_httpx_h2 returns (False, 'httpx_h2_auto_disabled') — prevents further httpx_h2 attempts in same process.

key_findings: httpx+h2 NOT installed in .venv — httpx_h2_disabled is the always-correct reason
should_use_httpx_h2 correctly checks h2 availability as final gate before returning True
classify_httpx_h2_error(exc) added — 13 error categories, CancelledError re-raised
record_httpx_h2_failure() — increments counter per failure, auto-disable at 3
transport_fallback_reason set on all FetchResult paths after httpx_h2 fallback
should_use_httpx_h2 blocks with 'httpx_h2_auto_disabled' reason once 3 failures hit
F206AF code does NOT change scheduler/discovery/storage behavior
No git operations performed per NO-GIT rule
httpx_h2_state_functions: reset_httpx_h2_state() — clears counter and auto-disable flag (tests only)

fallback_policy_table.httpx_h2 exception caught: record failure → classify error → set _httpx_reason='httpx_h2_fallback' → continue to aiohttp → set transport_fallback_reason on FetchResult
fallback_policy_table.httpx_h2 failure count >= 3: should_use_httpx_h2 returns (False, 'httpx_h2_auto_disabled') — no more httpx_h2 attempts in this process
fallback_policy_table.httpx_h2 success: normal FetchResult with selected_transport='httpx_h2', no fallback reason set
fallback_policy_table.CancelledError during httpx_h2: re-raised immediately, not classified, not counted as failure

verdict_notes: httpx+h2 not installed prevents real httpx_h2 fetch testing in this environment
F206AF code correctly handles all specified failure scenarios
fallback policy correctly routes failed httpx_h2 to aiohttp
